series_metadata.series_description: Obligates funds for personal serivce, rental agree ments and capital improvements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years after expiration of the contract, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after expiration of the contract, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
